title: oncidium guianense subsp. alborubrum
intro: Oncidium guianense subsp. alborubrum is a subspecies of orchid, native to the Guiana Shield in South America. Research suggests that this plant has medicinal properties, with studies indicating its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oncidium guianense subsp. alborubrum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. However, I couldn't find any information on herbal preparations using this plant, suggesting that more research is needed to understand its full potential.
